title: Proteomic profiling of a chronic inflammatory skin condition

findings.executive_summary: Mass-spectrometry proteomics on skin biopsies to identify proteins differentially expressed in an inflammatory skin condition. Differential-expression testing followed by pathway enrichment.

embedding.source_text: Proteomic profiling of a chronic inflammatory skin condition | Mass-spectrometry proteomics on skin biopsies to identify proteins differentially expressed in an inflammatory skin condition. Differential-expression testing followed by pathway enrichment. | Methods: differential expression, pathway analysis | Data: proteomics, mass spectrometry | Disease: inflammatory skin condition | Tools: limma, DEP, clusterProfiler
